prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年哈尔滨工业大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约3893名→3102名→1971名→1028名→890名，呈持续大幅前移趋势，5年累计前移约3000名，年均前 移约750名，竞争热度逐年攀升；2025年基准位次约890名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年99人、2022年85人、2023年62人、2024年45人、2025年45人，呈 持续缩减趋势；2026年计划仅30人，较2025年缩减15人（-33.3%），缩招幅度显著，将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学为985/211/双一流高校，软科中国 大学排名2026年第12位（较2025年第14位上升2位），稳居全国顶尖工科强校行列，对高分考生吸引力持续增强；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，未见明显负面舆 情；抖音热度总排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，考生关注度高；2024年曾出现投档线异常信号但2025年已恢复，整体报考热度不减；拥有17个A-及以上学 科，其中力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程为A+，计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、软件工程等为A，工科实力全国顶尖，对山东考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等哈工大王牌专业均为2024年高热推荐/推荐，社会热度高；山东省2026年高考报名总数约72万人，较2025年增加约3.9万人 （+5.7%），考生规模扩大进一步加剧竞争；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江省，非山东省本地高校，但山东省是其重要生源 地（2025年山东招生占全国18.2%）；2026年计划大幅缩减至30人，外省考生报考竞争将更加激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅缩减33.3% 、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%、学校排名上升及王牌专业社会热度高等因素，竞争进一步加剧，位次将继续前移。在2025年基准890名基础上，预测2026年最低录取位次约697名， 区间613–781名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（院士特色班）
- 工科试验班（未来技术拔尖班）
- 人工智能（中关村班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（AI院士特色班）
- 具身智能（大湾区班）
- 工科试验班（尖班、港大优学班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（航天与自动化类，参考往年）
- 工科试验班（智能装备类，参考往年）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年哈工大在山东招生计划仅30人且全部为顶尖特色班型，竞争极为激烈。位次在预测区间（613–781名）内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（院士特色班、未来技术拔尖班） ，位次略低于区间下限的考生可考虑二档专业作为稳妥选择。建议以二档为主攻方向、一档为冲刺目标，三档专业作为保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Harbin Institute of Technology in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 3893 → 3102 → 1971 → 1028 → 890, showing a continuous and significant upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 3000 positions over 5 years and an average annual increase of about 750 positions, indicating rising competition heat; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 890; the enrollment plan for this university in Shandong's comprehensive category was 99 in 2021, 85 in 2022, 62 in 2023, 45 in 2024, and 45 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction trend; the 2026 plan is only 30, a reduction of 15 (-33.3%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology is a 985/211/Double First-Class university, ranking 12th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (up 2 places from 14th in 2025), firmly among the top engineering powerhouses in the country, with increasing appeal to high-scoring candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 10th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure and high candidate attention; in 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission line but it recovered in 2025, overall application heat remains undiminished; it has 17 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering, and A in Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Software Engineering, etc., with top-tier engineering strength nationwide, strongly attracting Shandong candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other flagship majors of HIT are all high-heat recommended/recommended in 2024, with high social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to 2025, further intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, not a local university in Shandong, but Shandong is an important source of students (Shandong enrollment accounted for 18.2% of national enrollment in 2025); the 2026 plan is sharply reduced to 30, making competition for out-of-province candidates even more intense.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the significant 33.3% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 5.7% increase in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province, the rise in university ranking, and the high social popularity of flagship majors, competition will further intensify and rankings will continue to move forward. Based on the 2025 baseline of 890, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 697, with a range of 613–781.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Academician Special Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology Top Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Zhongguancun Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Academician Special Class)
- Embodied Intelligence (Greater Bay Area Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Class, HKU Excellence Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Automation, refer to previous years)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Equipment, refer to previous years).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, HIT's enrollment plan in Shandong is only 30, all in top-tier special class types, making competition extremely fierce. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (613–781) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Academician Special Class, Future Technology Top Class); candidates slightly below the lower limit of the range can consider Tier 2 majors as a stable choice. It is recommended to take Tier 2 as the main direction, Tier 1 as the sprint target, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
